en_title: Marvel's Wolverine Lets You Turn Off the Gore, Censoring All the Blood
cn_title: 《漫威金刚狼》可关闭血腥特效
subtitle: 血与暴力，一键屏蔽
opus_summary: Insomniac开发的《漫威金刚狼》是一款暴力程度极高的游戏，金刚狼用艾德曼合金爪在近战中刺穿、肢解敌人，鲜血四溅，自身也会受到细致的身体损伤。但游戏导演Mike Daly在索尼State of Play发布会前接受IGN采访时确认，游戏提供了细致的无障碍选项，允许玩家关闭血腥效果，隐藏血液等暴力元素，让不喜极端暴力的玩家也能接受。该功能并非简单开关，而是选择性屏蔽，保留核心战斗体验。

paragraphs.en: Marvel’s Wolverine in a violent game — this is something developer Insomniac set out to build from the very start. The X-Men legend uses his adamantium claws to stab and dismember his opponents in rage-fueled melee combat, showering them and himself in blood. We see Wolverine suffer detailed body damage, his flesh tearing to expose his adamantium-laced skeleton. This is a game not for the faint of heart. But, if you don’t like the look of all that gore, you can turn it off.
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威金刚狼》是一款暴力游戏——这是开发商Insomniac从一开始就打算打造的。这位X战警传奇人物用他的艾德曼合金爪在愤怒的近战中刺穿并肢解对手，鲜血溅满敌我双方。我们看到金刚狼遭受细致的身体损伤，皮肉撕裂，露出镶有艾德曼合金的骨骼。这款游戏不适合胆小者。但如果你不喜欢那些血腥场面，你可以将其关闭。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with IGN ahead of Wolverine’s appearance at Sony’s State of Play showcase , game director Mike Daly confirmed that there is a “nuanced” accessibility feature that lets you censor the gore.
paragraphs.cn: 在金刚狼亮相索尼State of Play发布会之前，游戏导演Mike Daly接受IGN采访时确认，游戏中有一个「细致入微」的无障碍功能，允许玩家屏蔽血腥效果。

paragraphs.en: "We know that it's not for everyone," Daly said of Wolverine’s extreme violence. "And because we knew this was going to be a big part of the game from the beginning, we also implemented an accessibility feature to turn off gore. It's clearly integrated into the game in a lot of different ways, and so it's a nuanced feature that is very selective about what we show, what we censor, turning off blood and things like that, just in order to make it more palatable to people who don't really want to have that part of the experience."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们知道这并不适合所有人，」Daly谈到金刚狼的极端暴力时说道，「而且因为我们从一开始就知道这将是游戏的重要组成部分，所以我们也实现了一个关闭血腥效果的无障碍功能。它显然以多种方式融入了游戏，因此这是一个细致的功能，非常选择性地决定我们展示什么、屏蔽什么，关闭血液等效果，只是为了让那些不想体验这部分内容的玩家更容易接受。」

paragraphs.en: So, if you want to tone down the violence in Marvel’s Wolverine, you can. Be sure to check out our interview with Insomniac in full to get a sense of how Marvel’s Wolverine actually plays.
paragraphs.cn: 所以，如果你想降低《漫威金刚狼》的暴力程度，你可以做到。请务必查看我们对Insomniac的完整采访，了解《漫威金刚狼》的实际玩法。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解PlayStation准备了什么，这里是2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容。
